title: The Complete Works of Swami Vivekananda - Volume 3
author: Swami Vivekananda
description: Published by Advaita Ashrama, a publication house of Ramakrishna Math, Belur Math, this is Volume 3 of the nine volume series constituting 'The Complete Works of Swami Vivekananda'.
